reviews.comment:
Estimados compañeros del Automóvil  Club Argentino les comento mi experiencia  en esta estacion de servicio.Fui atendido por el playero Claudio.
Les comento llegamos para cargar combustible y se acerca Claudio  le digo para cargar infinia..en ese momento  llega otro auto y le carga nafta,una falta de respeto  total el mismo al yo hacerle el reclamo me dice que el pesaba que el otro compañero me iva a cargar nafta,y le dije que no me parecía una buena respuesta.El mismo me dijo que tenía que aceptarla jejeje estamos todos locos ? Nada yo  al final me fui y porque la verdad no estaba para hacerme drama tan temprano.
Muy atentos compañeros del Automóvil  Club ya que al parecer allí la orden de llegada no lo toman en cuenta.

(Translated by Google)
Dear fellow members of the Argentine Automobile Club, I'm sharing my experience at this gas station. I was served by Claudio, the gas station attendant.
I told you, we arrived to get gas, and Claudio approached. I told him to fill up with Infinia. At that moment, another car pulled up and filled up with gas. It was a complete lack of respect. When I complained, he told me he thought the other member was going to fill up with gas for me. I told him that didn't seem like a good answer. He told me I had to accept it. "Hehe, are we all crazy?" "Nothing." In the end, I left because I honestly wasn't up to making a fuss so early.
Very attentive, fellow members of the Automobile Club. Apparently, they don't take into account the order of arrival there.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3860923549066547305/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNZMklUMi1nRRAB
